title: Unit Converter for Command Palette
shortDescription: Convert between common units of measurement like length, weight, time, volume, and area.
description:
Convert between common units of measurement directly from the Command Palette. Supports a wide range of unit categories including length, weight, time, volume, area, temperature, speed, and more.

Simply type a value and unit to see instant conversions across all related units. Fast, accurate, and always accessible without leaving your workflow.
